name: E Fd S&P 500 Idx(QDII-LOF) CNH
summary: E Fd S&P 500 Idx(QDII-LOF) CNH is a fund that tracks the performance of the S&P 500 Index and allows Chinese investors to invest in US equities. As a Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII) Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF), it provides access to overseas markets and is denominated in CNH (offshore Renminbi). It is managed by E Fund Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
